//: Copy this file to appsettings.Production.json and adjust the values.

App.//AllowedAppPools: Whitelist of pool names this application is permitted to view and act upon. Empty array means 'all pools on the server'. Recommend explicitly listing them.
App.//AllowedIpRanges: IP allow-list. Each entry is either a single IPv4/IPv6 address or a CIDR range. Empty array disables filtering. Applied AFTER X-Forwarded-For when behind a trusted proxy.
App.//ForwardedProxies: Reverse proxies in front of this app (single IPs or CIDR). Their X-Forwarded-For / X-Forwarded-Proto are honored so cookies stay Secure and the real client IP is logged. Loopback is always trusted; list only upstream proxies. Empty array = IIS-only deployment.
App.//LoginMaxAttempts: Number of consecutive failed logins before the account is locked.
App.//LoginLockoutMinutes: Lockout duration in minutes after LoginMaxAttempts is reached.
App.//RequireHttps: Force HTTPS redirection and Secure cookies. Set to false ONLY for local development without TLS.
App.//SqlitePath: Relative or absolute path to the SQLite database file. The directory must be writable by the IIS Application Pool identity that hosts THIS app.
App.//SessionTimeoutMinutes: Auth cookie sliding expiration window in minutes.
